title: AI_OS Packet Validator Contract
description: Foundation schema stub for one validator entry attached to a canonical packet.

schema.description: Identifies this object as an AI_OS packet validator contract.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this validator schema contract.

validator_id.description: Stable validator identifier, such as git_diff_check or no_secrets.

order.description: Execution order in the validator chain.

command.description: Command or named validator action to run.

required.description: Whether this validator must pass before the packet can advance.

mode.description: Validator mode, normally DRY_RUN_READ_ONLY for safety checks.

state.description: Current validator state, such as NOT_RUN, PASS, WARNING, FAIL, BLOCKED, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.
